title: clinopodium vulgare f. parviflorum
intro: Clinopodium vulgare f. parviflorum, also known as small-flowered wild basil, is a plant species belonging to the mint family. Clinopodium vulgare f. parviflorum is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding abilities. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, treating colds and respiratory infections, and exhibiting antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium vulgare f. parviflorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
